attributes.action: Revoke permission for US to use UK bases in Operation Epic Fury
attributes.additional_details:
I am concerned that involvement in potential military action against Iran could place British Armed Forces personnel at risk without clear legal authority or Parliamentary approval.
The UK should not become involved in military escalation initiated by another country without full debate and a transparent legal basis under UK and international law. 
Protect British personnel first. The UK must not enter conflict without independent legal review and clear national interest.
attributes.background: We call on the Government to require explicit Parliamentary approval before UK military bases, airspace or assets are used by foreign forces in operations against Iran. The UK must not become involved in military escalation without full democratic scrutiny and debate.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Hold an immediate parliamentary vote on US use of UK bases" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762994

You may also be interested in this petition: "Stop allowing the US to use British bases for any action against Iran" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762916
